creator: obrien@Nuxi.cs.ucdavis.edu
text:
Cless is a port of GNU's less version 290 that suports the display
	of files written in the Chinese language using the GB (simple) or
	Big5 (complex) encodings.  Also, the help is can be displayed in
	either Simple Chinese, Complex Chinese, or English.  Cless should
	be run w/in a CXterm or simular terminal emulator supporting
	Chinese language encodings.

Fix: 

Portball uploaded to freefall.cdrom.com:/incoming
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
